examples.title: K-Means Clustering Algorithm
examples.description: A Python implementation of the K-Means clustering algorithm
examples.code:
import numpy as np
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans

# Generate random data
np.random.seed(0)
data = np.random.rand(100, 2)

# Create a KMeans instance
kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=5)

# Fit the model
centers = kmeans.fit(data)

# Predict the labels
labels = kmeans.predict(data)

# Print the labels
print(labels)
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates the K-Means clustering algorithm using scikit-learn.

examples.title: Hierarchical Clustering Algorithm
examples.description: An R implementation of the hierarchical clustering algorithm
examples.code:
library(cluster)

# Generate random data
set.seed(0)
data <- matrix(rnorm(100*2), nrow=100)

# Create a distance matrix
dist_matrix <- dist(data)

# Perform hierarchical clustering
clusters <- hclust(dist_matrix, method='ward.D2')

# Plot the dendrogram
plot(clusters)
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates the hierarchical clustering algorithm using the cluster package in R.
